calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ellen Kahn for and with Vivian Solomon.

Ms. Kahn and Ms. Solomon explained circumstances, family dynamics, and spoke of Susan's and the Father's medical condition. The Petition for Modification of Trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar May-20-2013 Continued To Jun-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
